data.title: Bitcoin News: Human Rights Chief Argues This Shields From Authoritarian Control
data.description:
At the Bitcoin Policy Summit in Washington, D. C. , Human Rights Foundation Chief Strategy Officer Alex Gladstein told “a hall full of American leaders” that Bitcoin’s fixed supply and decentralized network have “completely decimated” dictators’ power to seize assets or inflate citizens out of savings
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/29/bitcoin-news-human-rights-chief-argues-this-shields-from-authoritarian-control/

data.title: Units.Network Raises $10M to Advance On-Chain AI Tools
data.description:
Catenaa, Sunday, June 29, 2025-Units. Network, a Layer-1 blockchain project rooted in the Waves Protocol, has raised $10 million to accelerate development in on-chain artificial intelligence, as competition intensifies in the AI-blockchain integration space. The funding, led by Nimbus Capital, the digital asset arm of In On Capital, will help scale the network’s validator infrastructure, deepen […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/units-network-raises-10m-to-advance-on-chain-ai-tools

data.title: Trump-Linked DT Marks Trims Stake in Crypto Firm
data.description:
Catenaa, Sunday, June 29, 2025- A company linked to President Donald Trump has reduced its stake in a major crypto venture, trimming its equity in World Liberty Financial’s holding firm from 60% in March to 40%, according to legal disclosures reviewed on the project’s website. DT Marks DeFi LLC, which had controlled 75% of the […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/trump-linked-dt-marks-trims-stake-in-crypto-firm

data.title: 8 Republican senators may kill Trump’s entire bill as Thune desperately tries to work them

data.title: Vitalik Buterin says pluralistic ZK digital IDs are the ‘best realistic solution’ to preserve privacy
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin believes that one-per-person digital ID systems, despite using zero-knowledge proofs (ZK proofs), carry risks to privacy. ZK proof wrapped IDs offered by World ID (formerly Worldcoin) using biometric data and ZK proofs have been gaining traction, recently crossing 10 million users.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/vitalik-buterin-says-pluralistic-zk-digital-ids-are-the-best-realistic-solution-to-preserve-privacy/

data.title: S&P 500 Is Going To Go Higher Amid Resilient Economy, Dissipating Uncertainties and Cautious Investor Sentiment, According to Yardeni Research
data.description:
The president of sell-side Wall Street firm Yardeni Research, Ed Yardeni, believes that the S&P 500 is firmly marching in bull territory. In a new interview on CNBC Television, Yardeni predicts that the US stock market will surge to new all-time highs amid an improving macroeconomic picture.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/29/sp-500-is-going-to-go-higher-amid-resilient-economy-dissipating-uncertainties-and-cautious-investor-sentiment-according-to-yardeni-research/

data.title: Crypto Firms Blast Kenya’s Bill for Letting Binance Proxy Shape Policy
data.description:
In an ongoing wave of crypto adoption, crypto policy and regulation are often seen coming under fire from market players. In a recent update, Kenya’s draft VASP Bill is to embed a Binance‑linked think tank on its oversight board, according to disclosures seen by The Kenyan Wall Street.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/29/crypto-firms-blast-kenyas-bill-for-letting-binance-proxy-shape-policy/

data.title: Financial advisor Ric Edelman says crypto should make up 10-40% of a portfolio
data.description:
Financial advisors should be recommending clients to allocate between 10% to 40% of their portfolio to crypto, influential investment manager Ric Edelman told CNBC on Friday. According to Edelman, founder of the Digital Assets Council of Financial Professionals, the percentage of allocation to crypto should be decided based on the client’s risk appetite.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/financial-advisor-ric-edelman-says-crypto-should-make-up-10-40-of-a-portfolio/

data.title: ‘Mastermind of a Complex Web of Deception’ – Ringleader Ran Nationwide Bank Fraud and Money Laundering Operation That Stole $2,000,000: DOJ
data.description:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) says an “elusive” Nigerian man has been convicted of running a nationwide banking and money laundering scheme that hauled in more than $2 million.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/29/mastermind-of-a-complex-web-of-deception-ringleader-ran-nationwide-bank-fraud-and-money-laundering-operation-that-stole-2000000-fbi/

data.title: Coinbase Surges 43% in June, Tops S&P 500 After Regulatory Wins and Partnerships
data.description:
Coinbase has emerged as the best-performing stock in the S&P 500 for June, climbing 43% amid a surge of bullish momentum driven by regulatory clarity, product innovation, and deeper institutional interest in crypto.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/coinbase-surges-43-in-june-tops-sp-500-after-regulatory-wins-and-partnerships/
